events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: Structural bolting, DTI (direct tension indicator) squirter washers not fully crushed. Work rough-complete. RCSC Specification. DTI washers indicate proper bolt tension; protrusions (squirters) must be compressed sufficiently per manufacturer/RCSC. Not fully crushed means insufficient tension; non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Structural bolting insufficient tension can lead to connection failure, critical? In heavy industrial, high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? rough-complete. value not asked 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed indicating bolts not tensioned to required pretension. actions: Remove/retighten bolts per RCSC and manufacturer using turn-of-nut or calibrated wrench; re-inspect DTI; replace DTI if damaged. rationale: RCSC requires DTI protrusions be compressed to verify minimum bolt tension; visible uncrushed squirters means inadequate pretension. references: RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts (Section on DTI). Need exact JSON shape. Ensure no prose outside.

  "findings": [
    "DTI squirter washers are not fully crushed, indicating the bolts have not achieved the required pretension.",
    "Connection may not develop the specified clamping force and slip resistance."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Retighten or reinstall bolts using the specified tensioning method until DTI protrusions are properly compressed per RCSC and the DTI manufacturer.",
    "Inspect all bolts in the connection and replace any damaged DTIs or bolts.",
    "Re-verify pretension with calibrated wrench or turn-of-nut method and document inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "RCSC requires that direct tension indicators (DTI) be compressed sufficiently to verify that high-strength bolts have been pretensioned to the required value. Un-crushed squirter protrusions are visible evidence of inadequate tension, making the installation non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, DTI installation and inspection requirements"
  ]
}
